title: Umami Gooey Spanish Tomato Stir-fry
description: A one-pot dish featuring gooey tomatoes, coriander leaves, and dumplings in a savory sauce, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: coriander leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh is recommended for best flavor

instructions: Chop onions finely and mince garlic cloves.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add chopped tomatoes (or defrosted frozen ones) to the pan along with salt and pepper. Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
If using dumplings, add them now and stir well. If not using dumplings, continue with the next step.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, fish sauce (if used), sugar, and water or vegetable broth to create a glaze. Add this mixture over the tomatoes in the pan.
Stir-fry everything together until the tomatoes are tender and the sauce has thickened slightly, about 5-7 minutes more.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves before serving.
